6105.one_line_summary: Marketplace functionality for NFT trading with diverse royalty schemes.
6105.notes: Enables non-intermediary NFT trading with support for value-added royalties and flexible payment tokens.

6120.one_line_summary: Universal router for token spending in transfer-and-call pattern.
6120.notes: Replaces approve-then-call with secure transfer-and-call, supports ERC-20/721/1155 via singleton factory pattern.

6123.one_line_summary: Deterministic protocol for automated settlement of financial derivatives.
6123.notes: Removes counterparty risk via on-chain valuation and settlement; supports collateralized and defaultable variants.

6147.one_line_summary: NFT/SBT guard role separating holding and transfer rights with expiration.
6147.notes: Enables anti-theft, lending, leasing, and SBT management by separating transfer authority from ownership.

6150.one_line_summary: Filesystem-like hierarchical NFTs with parent-child relationships.
6150.notes: Enables nested NFT structures for forums, e-commerce, and org hierarchies with optional enumerable and burnable extensions.

6170.one_line_summary: Common interface for cross-chain arbitrary message bridges.
6170.notes: Standardizes send/receive pattern across competing AMBs; draft status indicates ongoing refinement.

6220.one_line_summary: Composable NFTs with equippable fixed and slot parts via Catalog.
6220.notes: Enables NFT composition with cherry-picked parts and equipped child NFTs; supports digital scarcity via exclusive equipping.

6224.one_line_summary: Registry system for managing protocol smart contracts with dependency injection.
6224.notes: Enables contract upgrades, runtime substitution, and dependency management via ContractsRegistry and Dependant pattern.

6229.one_line_summary: ERC-4626 vaults extended with lock-in periods and scheduled deposits/redemptions.
6229.notes: Allows vaults to lock assets during strategy execution; handles queued operations across vault rounds.

6239.one_line_summary: Soulbound tokens with RDF triple metadata for semantic social identity.
6239.notes: Extends ERC-5192 with W3C RDF standards; enables linked data layer for interconnected social metadata.

6268.one_line_summary: Untransferability indicator for ERC-1155 semi-fungible and fungible soulbound tokens.
6268.notes: Standardizes locked/unlocked status for SBTs across fungibility types via ERC-165 feature detection.

6315.one_line_summary: ERC-2771 extension with per-forwarder namespaced addresses for trustless account abstraction.
6315.notes: Enables namespaced transactions and Namespaced function variants; allows trustless meta-transactions without per-app trust.

6327.one_line_summary: Password-based signing via zero-knowledge proofs for on-chain verification.
6327.notes: Provides password-based alternative to private key signing; integrable with AA wallets as plugin.

6353.one_line_summary: ERC-20 extension enabling automatic percentage donations with whitelisted charity addresses.
6353.notes: Supports flexible rates and per-holder charity preferences; donation deducted from sender during transfer.

6357.one_line_summary: Single-contract multicall via delegatecall for atomic multi-function execution.
6357.notes: Reduces transaction count for bulk operations; optional payable variant with msg.value splitting.
